# Format: hex_addr hex_data  [# comment]

40020010 00000001  # 
40130000 00000000  # stop avg
40130008 00000248  # avg buf len
40130018 00000000  # stop decim
40130020 00000248  # decim buf len
40130000 00000001  # start avg
40130018 00000001  # start decim
40260000 00000010  # TIME_RST (bit 4)
40260000 00000005  # PROC_START (bit 0) + CORE_START (bit 2)
